desc: Assisted with creative materials for both the pitch and press releases supporting the landmark multi-year partnership between the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences and AEG — making L.A. Live the new home of the Oscars® starting with the 101st ceremony in 2029 through 2039.
Developed branded presentation materials and visual concepts supporting partnership conversations tied to live event exposure and media placements.
Designed pitch decks and visual storytelling assets for sponsorship proposals aligned with televised event integrations and digital visibility opportunities.
Deck creation and partnership visuals contributed to a $4M arena sponsorship, highlighting premium signage, hospitality integrations, and game-day activations.
Designed pitch materials supporting a $3.5M partnership, featuring promotional integrations for Stranger Things and Squid Game across digital and in-arena platforms.
Deck development contributed to a $1.5M partnership, resulting in Twilio branding placement on LA Kings away helmets and in-arena visibility assets.

Created all creative materials end-to-end — pitch deck, follow-up creatives, and press release — supporting the multi-year partnership making Della an Official Partner of the LA Galaxy, featuring matchday fan activations, on-site engagement stations, digital integrations, and co-branded fan merchandise.

brand: Vet Tix × LA Kings & Ontario Reign
desc: Created all creative materials for the pitch and have personally executed in-arena creative activations across 50+ LA Kings home games. The mission-driven multiyear partnership makes Vet Tix an official partner of the LA Kings (NHL) and Ontario Reign (AHL), expanding access to professional hockey for thousands of veterans, active service members, first responders, and their families across Southern California.
Created partnership presentation materials and branded mockups supporting corporate sponsorship discussions and venue-level branding concepts.
